Biography
Biography
Maryam Motallebighomi is a doctoral student at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University, advised by Aanjhan Ranganathan. Her research focuses on wireless security.
Before joining Northeastern, she received her master’s in computer architecture from Sharif University of Technology in Iran.
